use_cases: Displaying user profile images in navigation headers and dashboards
Showing avatar placeholders with fallback initials for user profiles
Representing team members or collaborators in workspace interfaces
Displaying user avatars in comment sections or activity feeds
Showing user profile pictures in contact lists or member directories
ai_summary: A lightweight avatar component built with Radix UI primitives that displays user profile images with automatic fallback to initials when no image is available. Uses Tailwind for minimal styling with rounded-full design and muted background fallback. Commonly used in dashboards, workspace interfaces, and user profile sections.
